mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_permission WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM t_permission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT p.* FROM t_permission p INNER JOIN t_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM t_permission p INNER JOIN t_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_permission (permission_code, resource, action, description, created_at, deleted) VALUES (#{permissionCode}, #{resource}, #{action}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_permission SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
